build.beforeDevCommand: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let d=process.cwd();while(!fs.existsSync(path.join(d,'package.json'))){const p=path.dirname(d);if(p===d){console.error('package.json not found (cannot start frontend)');process.exit(1);}d=p;}const npm=process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm';const r=spawnSync(npm,['run','dev:tauri'],{cwd:d,stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1);"
build.beforeBuildCommand: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let d=process.cwd();while(!fs.existsSync(path.join(d,'package.json'))){const p=path.dirname(d);if(p===d){console.error('package.json not found (cannot build frontend)');process.exit(1);}d=p;}const npm=process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm';const r=spawnSync(npm,['run','build:tauri'],{cwd:d,stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1);"

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https: http:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' https: http: ws: wss: ipc: tauri:; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-src 'self';
